offline.hint: You can also check if WiFi is on or if there's any issue with your data connection.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.subtitle: Add an extra layer of security to your account
twoFactor.disabledDescription: Protect your account with two-factor authentication using an authenticator app.
twoFactor.enabledDescription: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
twoFactor.enabledDescriptionWithDate: Your account has been protected since {{date}}.
twoFactor.setupDescription: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app or enter the code manually.
twoFactor.scanWithApp: Scan with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
twoFactor.disableDescription: To disable 2FA, enter your current authentication code or a recovery code.
twoFactor.useRecoveryCode: You can also use a recovery code
twoFactor.recoveryCodesSubtitle: Save these codes in a safe place
twoFactor.recoveryCodesWarning: These codes are the only way to access your account if you lose your device. Each code can only be used once.
twoFactor.loginSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
twoFactor.loginLockedOut: Too many failed attempts. Please sign in again.
twoFactor.loginRecoveryHint: If you lost access to your authenticator, use a recovery code.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Start generating income in 3 simple steps

step1.title: Sign Up
step1.description: Create your account and join a global real estate network with presence across Latin America.

step2.title: Connect
step2.description: List properties, tours, or refer others to grow your network of contacts and opportunities.

step3.title: Earn
step3.description: Receive commissions on every transaction in your network, up to 5 levels deep with transparent tracking.

features.title: Everything you need in one platform
features.subtitle: Tools designed to maximize your income potential

tours.title: Tours
tours.description: Curated tourism packages: adventure, cultural, gastronomic, and luxury.

crm.title: Integrated CRM
crm.description: Manage leads, tasks, and communications in one place without external tools.

commissions.title: Multi-Level Commissions
commissions.description: Earn up to 5 levels deep with transparent, real-time commission tracking.

payments.title: Global Payments
payments.description: PayPal, MercadoPago, and crypto wallet support to collect from anywhere.

testimonials.title: What our agents say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from people who transformed their business with Nexo Real

t1.quote: In 6 months I built a network of 40 agents and commissions exceeded what I earned at my traditional agency. The platform is intuitive and the CRM saves me hours of work.
t1.name: Valentina Restrepo

t2.quote: Tourism packages sell themselves thanks to the quality of the presentation. My clients love booking directly and I earn commissions with no extra effort.
t2.name: Roberto Jiménez

t3.quote: I started as an independent agent with no experience. With the CRM and the platform tools, I already have a network of 15 people generating passive income.
t3.name: Camila Torres
